import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut nums = [0, 0]
  mut idx = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut in_num = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let bopt = string.byte_at(input, i)
    match bopt
    when Some(b)
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        if not in_num
          cur = 0
          sign = 1
          in_num = true
        end
        cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      else if b == 45 and not in_num
        sign = -1
        in_num = true
        cur = 0
      else
        if in_num
          if idx < 2
            nums = nums.copy()
          end
          if idx == 0
            nums = [sign * cur, 0]
          else if idx == 1
            nums = [nums[0], sign * cur]
          end
          idx = idx + 1
          in_num = false
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    if idx == 0
      nums = [sign * cur, 0]
    else if idx == 1
      nums = [nums[0], sign * cur]
    end
    idx = idx + 1
  end
  let a = nums[0]
  let b = nums[1]
  let r = a * a + b * b
  println("r=#{r}")
end
